overall.description: Gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing the protagonist Sam Porter Bridges walking through a rugged grassy landscape with a large cargo load on his back. The character traverses an open field, crosses a shallow stream, and follows a cliffside path overlooking a vast fjord in overcast, misty weather conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant snow-capped mountain

events.description: screen fades to black indicating a scene transition or time skip

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward rocky outcrops while carrying a large stack of cargo on back

entered.detail: large mountain peak covered in snow visible in the distance against grey clouds
cluster of dark rocks emerging from the grassy field ahead
tall brownish-green grass covering the open terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassland under an overcast sky, with a snow-capped mountain visible in the far distance. The character walks steadily forward through the tall grass toward a rocky outcrop, carrying a large cargo load. The scene ends with a fade to black transition.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered boulders and shallow stream

events.description: character crosses a shallow stream flowing through the grassland

agents.ego_description: navigating through uneven grassy terrain, carefully stepping across a shallow stream while maintaining balance with the heavy cargo load

entered.detail: rolling green hills extending into the distance
large grey rocks scattered across the hillside terrain
narrow flow of water cutting through the grass
dense green grass covering the ground

segments.scene_description: Following a transition, the character continues through a lush grassy landscape with rolling hills. The terrain features scattered boulders and a shallow stream which the character crosses. The environment is devoid of other people, emphasizing the solitary journey through the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge overlooking a large fjord

events.description: terrain opens up to reveal a vast body of water and distant mountains in the valley below

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along a narrow cliffside path with a steep drop to the water below, maintaining balance while carrying the heavy cargo

entered.detail: large body of water visible in the valley below the cliff edge
steep drop-off at the edge of the walking path
mountain range visible across the water under the overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The path leads to a dramatic cliff edge overlooking a vast fjord with distant mountains visible across the water. The character continues along the narrow cliffside trail, navigating around rocks while the steep drop to the water remains on the left. The scene emphasizes the scale of the landscape and the precariousness of the journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a wide, desolate grassland that leads toward a rugged rocky outcrop. It begins with the character walking steadily forward through tall grass under a heavy, overcast sky. As the camera tracks the journey, a snow-capped mountain remains visible in the far distance, anchoring the vast scale of the landscape. The scene then progresses as the character carries a large cargo load deeper into the terrain, finally moving toward the stony heights before the view fades to black.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush, rolling wilderness that gradually opens into a dramatic cliffside vista overlooking a vast fjord. It begins by following the character through a grassy landscape of rolling hills, moving past scattered boulders and across a shallow stream. As the terrain rises, the path leads the camera toward a steep cliff edge where the enclosed greenery gives way to an expansive view of distant mountains across the water. The scene then shifts to a narrow trail, navigating around rocks along the precipice while maintaining a constant view of the steep drop to the water below.
